do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test: strong identity field (scope/operating agency) differs — one is LIRR-specific, the other NYCT-specific. They are distinct projects under different agencies, not the same canonical identity.

weak_aliases.reason: Shared project name, useful for search but not merge authority due to different scope.
Shared project name, useful for search but not merge authority due to different scope.

suggestion.rationale: Both records share the base project name 'Security Initiatives' but differ in operating agency (LIRR vs NYCT), as shown by relation_context and source labels. Per the Identity Merge Canon for projects, identity includes scope; different operating agencies constitute different scope. The contradiction test (test 1) applies: differing strong identity fields (scope) force do_not_merge. The records are related but distinct project initiatives under separate agencies.
